title: Reusable Concept Glossary Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable concept glossary poster with concept glossary poster with one clear English title, modular explanation cards, and disciplined information hierarchy. AI concept glossary poster. five large concept cards. icon plus English term plus short English tag. clean technical poster hierarchy with Latin-alphabet typography only Concept Set: Prompt Engineering, Vibe Coding, Spec Driven Development, Context Engineering, Harness Engineering. Audience: AI builders and product teams. Visual Metaphor: modular command center where each concept is a labeled control module. Layout System: clean 4:5 educational poster with five large stacked cards, icon area, number, English term, and one short English tag. Typography Style: modern sans-serif, large readable English terms, Latin alphabet only, single-language English text. Accent Palette: white, charcoal, signal blue, lime, and small orange highlights. Subject: Make Prompt Engineering, Vibe Coding, Spec Driven Development, Context Engineering, Harness Engineering the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a clean technical poster surface built for readers who scan terms, icons, arrows, and compact definitions. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use five large stacked cards with icon, number, English term, and a very short 3-5 word English tag. Avoid translated labels, secondary language lines, or paragraph definitions. Style and Rendering: Render in modern sans-serif, large readable English terms, Latin alphabet only, single-language English text. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use white, charcoal, signal blue, lime, and small orange highlights. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
